impact: This prevents the PP&D daemon from silently declaring the backlog exhausted when selectable work only disappeared because a stale retry was parked without appending a new fixture-first recovery task.
summary: Add validation-only regression coverage for stale parked retry exhaustion being a supervisor error, not normal no_eligible_tasks.
target_task: Task checkbox-86: Add a validation-only regression fixture that reports `no_eligible_tasks` as a supervisor programming error when all remaining work is a parked stale retry and no new fixture-first task has been appended.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
